dict.string: Camera access is required for in-game photography and AR features in supported games.
Motion sensors are used for gyroscope controls in 3DS games. Tilt your device to control in-game camera or aim.
PP EMU uses the local network to discover and connect to nearby players for multiplayer gaming.
PP EMU requires microphone access to enable audio input features in supported games. Some games use microphone input for gameplay mechanics, voice commands, or interactive features.
